primary_sources.title: Introducing Guardrails 2.0 in ElevenAgents. Control how agents behave in production with a redesigned safety layer. You can define and enforce custom business policies. Or, toggle on pre-built protections to keep agents on-topic, on-brand, and resistant to manipulation.

Introducing the Anthropic Science Blog. Increasing the pace of scientific progress is a core part of Anthropic’s mission. The Science Blog will feature new research and stories of how scientists are using AI to accelerate their work. Read the intro: https://www.anthropic.com/research/introducing-anthropic-science

supporting_sources.title: Submissions for the 2026 AI Festival are now open until April 20th. This year's festival will celebrate works utilizing AI across Film, Design, New Media, Fashion, Advertising and Gaming. Learn more and submit your project at the link below.

Seedance 2.0 is finally available on Topview. If you have been following AI video, you already know Seedance 2.0 is in a league of its own. People waited a long time for this but It's here. Topview Agent V2 is built specifically for long-form video. Smart automation meets pinpoint control, studio-quality video of any length, for every industry. - Generate multiple AI-powered scenes inside one workflow - Unlimited video duration, not capped at 15 seconds - Agent V2 breaks your raw idea into a full structured storyboard automatically - Edit, rearrange, and refine scenes on a unified timeline - Business Annual accounts get 365 days of unlimited Seedance 2.0 access Intuitive enough for beginners, deep enough for pros . Sponsored by @TopviewAIhq 1/2
昨天下午写完第一版之后就发了 发完收到很多用户反馈，安装问题，权限问题，各种问题吧 事实证明 Vibe Coding 也是离不开用户反馈的 今天在 1.0.5 版本全部修完了 这个版本开始还支持自动更新了 有新版的时候可以在菜单栏里点击更新就升级完成啦 另外还有一个转录文件的彩蛋，不知道大家发现了没有
